subcodes.title: Words to Ali-Kuli Khan spoken in 1900
subcodes.first_line: While suffering death on the pathway of God is the highest attainment, still, that dying which continues on throughout life, giving lift to other souls, is the station of 'living martyrdom'.
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @martyrs and martyrdom, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
